translations.welcomeSubtitle: Intelligent AI-powered medical diagnosis and patient management system
translations.medicalDiagnosisDesc: Get AI-powered diagnostic assistance based on patient symptoms
translations.patientManagementDesc: Comprehensive patient records and history management
translations.medicalKnowledgeDesc: Access to vast medical databases and research
translations.aboutDescription1: IntelliCare is an advanced medical AI system that combines multiple open-source medical models to provide intelligent diagnostic assistance and patient management capabilities. Our system helps medical professionals make more informed decisions by providing data-driven insights and saving lives through AI-powered healthcare.
translations.aboutDescription2: Using state-of-the-art natural language processing and machine learning models, IntelliCare can analyze patient symptoms, medical history, and other relevant factors to provide diagnostic suggestions and treatment recommendations with intelligent precision.
translations.noPatientsDesc: Get started by adding your first patient to begin managing their medical records.
translations.noDeletedPatientsDesc: No patients have been deleted yet. Deleted patients will appear here and can be restored if needed.
translations.israeliIdHelp: Enter exactly 9 digits (include leading zeros if needed)
translations.ukNhsHelp: Enter in format XXX XXX XXXX
translations.doctorSummaryPlaceholder: Enter initial assessment, chief complaint, medical history, or any relevant notes...
translations.uploadDescription: PDF, DOC, XLS, Images, MRI, CT, X-Ray (up to 50MB each)
translations.requiredField: Please fill in all required fields
translations.deletePatientConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action can be undone by restoring the patient from the deleted patients list.
translations.deletePatientsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected patient(s)? This action can be undone by restoring the patients from the deleted patients list.

translations.adminRoleProtected: Admin role permissions are protected and cannot be modified

translations.deleteClinicFinalWarning: This action will permanently delete everything and cannot be undone.

translations.analyticsDescription: View insights and analytics from medical data

translations.helpDescription: Get support and learn how to use the platform
translations.landingDescription: Advanced AI-powered medical diagnosis and patient management system designed for healthcare professionals
translations.smartDiagnosisDesc: AI-powered diagnostic assistance with high accuracy
translations.missionStatement: To revolutionize healthcare through intelligent AI-powered medical diagnosis and patient management systems, making quality healthcare accessible and efficient for medical professionals worldwide.
translations.companyDescription: IntelliCare is a cutting-edge medical technology company founded in 2024, dedicated to transforming healthcare through artificial intelligence. Our advanced diagnostic systems help medical professionals make faster, more accurate decisions, ultimately saving lives and improving patient outcomes.
translations.aiPoweredDesc: Advanced machine learning algorithms trained on vast medical datasets
translations.secureDesc: HIPAA-compliant security ensuring patient data protection
translations.accurateDesc: Proven diagnostic accuracy with continuous learning capabilities
translations.supportDesc: Round-the-clock technical support for healthcare professionals
translations.joinThousands: Join thousands of healthcare professionals already using IntelliCare
translations.aboutCompanyText1: Founded with a vision to transform healthcare through artificial intelligence, IntelliCare combines cutting-edge technology with deep medical expertise to create solutions that truly make a difference in patient care.
translations.aboutCompanyText2: IntelliCare combines advanced technology with deep medical expertise to create solutions that truly make a difference in patient care.
translations.innovationDesc: Continuously pushing the boundaries of medical AI technology
translations.trustDesc: Building reliable, transparent systems that healthcare professionals can depend on
translations.excellenceDesc: Committed to the highest standards in medical accuracy and patient safety
translations.technologyDesc: Our platform leverages state-of-the-art machine learning models, natural language processing, and medical knowledge graphs to provide intelligent diagnostic assistance that learns and improves over time.
translations.futureVision: We envision a future where AI-powered healthcare tools are seamlessly integrated into medical practice, enhancing human expertise rather than replacing it, and making quality healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere.
translations.contactDescription: We're here to help you transform your medical practice with intelligent AI solutions. Reach out to us for support, questions, or to learn more about IntelliCare.
translations.describeSymptoms: Describe patient symptoms (e.g., fever, cough, headache)
translations.describeCurrentSymptoms: Describe current symptoms for the selected patient (e.g., fever, cough, headache)
translations.medicalHistoryAutoPopulated: Medical history auto-populated from patient records (you can edit if needed)
translations.patientDataLoaded: Patient data loaded. You can now enter current symptoms for diagnosis.
translations.enterCurrentSymptoms: Enter the current symptoms you want to diagnose for this patient
translations.enterCurrentSymptomsForPatient: Enter the current symptoms you want to diagnose for this patient
translations.medicalHistoryPopulated: Medical history populated from patient records
translations.medicalHistoryPopulatedFromRecords: Medical history populated from patient records
translations.aiModelAnalyzingSymptoms: AI model analyzing symptoms and medical data...

translations.diagnosisCompletedButResultsNotAvailable: Diagnosis completed but results could not be retrieved.

translations.failedToGetDiagnosis: Failed to get diagnosis. Please try again.
translations.diagnosisTimeout: Diagnosis request timed out. Please try again.
translations.diagnosisStopped: Diagnosis stopped. You can start a new diagnosis anytime.
translations.importantDisclaimer: Important: This is an AI-assisted diagnosis. Please consult with a healthcare professional for final diagnosis and treatment.
